description: A black-and-white photograph taken in an office/meeting room with a patterned carpet. On the left foreground stands an older man with short gray hair in a short-sleeved polo shirt and jeans with a belt, gesturing with both hands as he speaks, shown in profile. Behind him to the left is a flag on a pole and a large round DHS / 'U.S. DEPARTMENT OF HOMELAND SECURITY' seal mounted/leaning on the wall. To the right stand two people facing him: a man in a dark suit and tie whose face is digitally blurred, and a woman with long dark hair wearing a striped/checked blazer over a light top and dark pants, with a crossbody bag strap, listening. There is no overlaid headline, slogan, or designed text on the image (per the tweet, ICE Chicago meeting with Joe and Michelle Abraham, parents connected to the 'Midway Blitz' operation).
notable_text: Wall seal reads 'U.S. DEPARTMENT OF HOMELAND SECURITY'. No designed slogan overlay.
